data.title: Update project docs from 4-rule to 5-rule behavioral testing standard references
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update CLAUDE.md and other existing project documentation to reflect the unified 5-rule behavioral testing standard:

1. Update CLAUDE.md: change "4-rule standard" to "5-rule standard" in the behavioral testing standard reference
2. Search for any other documentation files that reference "4-rule" or "four rules" and update to "5-rule" or "five rules"
3. Remove any remaining references to the old parallel "Behavioral Test Requirement" section from implementation-plan
4. Verify no documentation references outdated rule counts

Files likely affected: CLAUDE.md, any docs that mention the behavioral testing standard rule count.

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)
- plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md (modify — update "4-rule" reference)
- plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md (modify — update "4-rule" reference)
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-test-quality.md (modify — update "four rules" reference)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references "5-rule" behavioral testing standard
  Verify: grep -q "5-rule" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] No documentation references "4-rule behavioral testing standard"
  Verify: ! grep -rq "4-rule behavioral testing standard" CLAUDE.md plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/docs/
- [ ] No documentation references "four rules" for the behavioral testing standard
  Verify: ! grep -q "defines four rules" plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-test-quality.md
